---
title: "研究二补充模型及结果"
author: "娜孜凯·朱马别克"
date: "2025年秋"
geometry: margin=2cm
documentclass: ctexart
output:
  rticles::ctex:
    number_sections: false
header-includes:
- \usepackage{fancyhdr}
- \pagestyle{fancy}
- \fancyhead[R]{《多元统计分析》期末项目}
---
#LPM模型(基准以及含有交互项的两个模型)
```{r}
library(dplyr)
resume = read.csv("D:/桌面/resume.csv")
# 将所有字符变量转换为因子
resume <- resume %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))
 resume <- resume %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.integer), as.numeric))
#清理有NA缺失值的行
resume_clean <- na.omit(resume)
#清理有NA缺失值的列
resume <- resume %>%
  select(where(~ !any(is.na(.))))
model_lpm1 = lm(as.numeric(reply) ~.-ID, , data = resume)
summary(model_lpm1)
model_lpm2 = lm(as.numeric(reply) ~.-ID + cicc*a10, , data = resume_clean)
summary(model_lpm2)
```
##Logit模型（所有变量+含交互项的两个模型）
```{r}
 model_logit1 = glm(reply ~.-ID , family = "binomial", data = resume)
 summary (model_logit1)
 model_logit2 = glm(reply ~.-ID+ cicc*a10, family = "binomial", data = resume_clean)
summary (model_logit2)


```
##预测小焦求职命运(LPM模型)
```{r}
# 提取 LPM（线性概率模型）的回归系数向量 β̂
beta_hat <- coef(model_lpm2)

# 构造“小焦”的个体特征向量 X
# 各变量取值含义如下：
# gendermale = 0：女性
# qualitylow = 1：简历质量较低
# experience = 11：11 年工作经验
# ciccyes = 0：未通过 CICC
# mvsayes = 0：未上过《多元统计分析》
# internyes = 0：无实习经历
# nonqqyes = 0：未使用非 QQ 邮箱
# cfayes = 1：通过 CFA
# a10yes = 0：非 A10 家庭背景
# college_985yes = 1：985 院校
# honoryes = 0：无荣誉称号
# reqexpyes = 1：岗位要求工作经验
# reqeducyes = 0：岗位无学历硬性要求
# reqcfayes = 1：岗位明确要求 CFA
# req996yes = 0：岗位未标注 996
# ciccyes:a10yes = 0：未同时具备 CICC 与 A10 背景

x_xiao_jiao <- c(
  `(Intercept)` = 1,
  gendermale = 0,
  qualitylow = 1,
  experience = 11,
  ciccyes = 0,
  mvsayes = 0,
  internyes = 0,
  nonqqyes = 0,
  cfayes = 1,
  a10yes = 0,
  college_985yes = 1,
  honoryes = 0,
  reqexpyes = 1,
  reqeducyes = 0,
  reqcfayes = 1,
  req996yes = 0,
  `ciccyes:a10yes` = 0
)

# 按照回归系数的顺序对特征向量重新排序，
# 确保 X 与 β̂ 在元素上一一对应
x_xiao_jiao <- x_xiao_jiao[names(beta_hat)]

# 计算点预测值：P̂(Y=1|X) = Xβ̂
# 在 LPM 中，该值可直接解释为获得 HR 回复的预测概率
pred_prob <- sum(x_xiao_jiao * beta_hat)
cat("小焦获得 HR 回复的预测概率为:", pred_prob, "\n")

# 提取模型的协方差矩阵，用于计算预测不确定性
vcov_matrix <- vcov(model_lpm2)

# 提取残差方差，用于构造预测区间
sigma_sq <- summary(model_lpm2)$sigma^2

# 提取自由度并计算 95% 置信水平下的 t 临界值
df <- summary(model_lpm2)$df[2]
t_crit <- qt(0.975, df)

# 计算预测值的标准误
# 第一项反映参数估计误差，第二项反映个体层面的随机扰动
se_fit_sq <- t(x_xiao_jiao) %*% vcov_matrix %*% x_xiao_jiao
se_pred <- sqrt(se_fit_sq + sigma_sq)

# 构造 95% 预测区间
lower_bound <- pred_prob - t_crit * se_pred
upper_bound <- pred_prob + t_crit * se_pred

cat("95%预测区间为: [", lower_bound, ",", upper_bound, "]\n")

```

## 预测小焦求职命运(logit模型)
```{r}
## 1. 提取 Logit 模型的估计系数 β̂
## beta_hat 是一个以变量名为索引的向量
beta_hat <- coef(model_logit2)

## 2. 构造小焦同学的特征向量 X
## 注意：变量名必须与 beta_hat 完全一致
## 因子变量在 glm() 中会被自动展开为虚拟变量（如 qualitylow）
x_xiao_jiao <- c(
  `(Intercept)` = 1,      # 截距项
  `gendermale` = 0,       # 性别：女性
  `qualitylow` = 1,       # 简历质量：低
  `experience` = 11,     # 工作年限
  `ciccyes` = 0,          # 是否有 CICC 经历
  `mvsayes` = 0,          # 是否上过多元统计分析课程
  `internyes` = 0,        # 是否有实习经历
  `nonqqyes` = 0,         # 是否非 QQ 简历
  `cfayes` = 1,           # 是否通过 CFA
  `a10yes` = 0,           # 是否来自 A10 家庭
  `college_985yes` = 1,   # 是否 985 院校
  `honoryes` = 0,         # 是否有荣誉称号
  `reqexpyes` = 1,        # 岗位是否要求经验
  `reqeducyes` = 0,       # 岗位是否要求学历
  `reqcfayes` = 1,        # 岗位是否要求 CFA
  `req996yes` = 0,        # 岗位是否 996
  `ciccyes:a10yes` = 0    # 交互项：CICC × A10
)

## 强制按照 beta_hat 的顺序排列特征向量
## 避免因顺序错位导致 Xβ 计算错误
x_xiao_jiao <- x_xiao_jiao[names(beta_hat)]

## 3. 计算线性预测值 η = Xβ
## η 为 log-odds（对数胜算），不是概率
eta_hat <- sum(x_xiao_jiao * beta_hat)

## 4. 通过 logistic 函数将 log-odds 映射为概率
## P(Y=1|X) = 1 / (1 + exp(-η))
pred_prob <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta_hat))
cat("小焦获得 HR 回复的预测概率为:", pred_prob, "\n")

## 5. 构造 95% 预测区间（基于正态近似）
## 5.1 提取系数的协方差矩阵 Var(β̂)
vcov_matrix <- vcov(model_logit2)
## 5.2 计算线性预测值 η 的标准误
## Var(η) = X' Var(β̂) X
se_eta <- sqrt(
  as.numeric(t(x_xiao_jiao) %*% vcov_matrix %*% x_xiao_jiao)
)
## 5.3 构造 η 的 95% 区间（正态近似）
z_crit <- qnorm(0.975)
eta_lower <- eta_hat - z_crit * se_eta
eta_upper <- eta_hat + z_crit * se_eta
## 5.4 将 log-odds 区间映射回概率区间
## Logit 模型的优势：预测区间严格落在 [0,1]
lower_prob <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta_lower))
upper_prob <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta_upper))
cat("95%预测区间为: [", lower_prob, ",", upper_prob, "]\n")
```
## 补充的模型
```{r}
# 加载所需包
library(dplyr)
library(modelsummary)
library(marginaleffects)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)

# 将简历中的离散变量统一转为因子，便于交互项解释
resume_clean <- resume %>%
  mutate(
    gender_f = factor(gender, labels = c("Female", "Male")),
    quality_f = factor(quality, labels = c("Low", "High")),
    cicc_f = factor(cicc, labels = c("NoCICC", "CICC")),
    mvsa_f = factor(mvsa, labels = c("NoMVSA", "MVSA")),
    intern_f = factor(intern, labels = c("NoIntern", "Intern")),
    nonqq_f = factor(nonqq, labels = c("NoNonQQ", "NonQQ")),
    cfayes_f = factor(cfa, labels = c("NoCFA", "CFA")),
    a10_f = factor(a10, labels = c("NonA10", "A10")),
    college_985_f = factor(college_985, labels = c("Non985", "985")),
    honor_f = factor(honor, labels = c("NoHonor", "Honor")),
    reply_f = factor(reply, labels = c("No", "Yes"))
  )

# 模型1：CFA × 院校类型（检验是否存在“背景补偿效应”）
model_cfa_college <- glm(
  reply_f ~ experience + gender_f + quality_f +
    cfayes_f * college_985_f + a10_f + intern_f + nonqq_f + honor_f,
  data = resume_clean,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

# 模型2：CFA × 简历质量（检验CFA是否弥补低质量简历）
model_cfa_quality <- glm(
  reply_f ~ experience + gender_f + quality_f +
    cfayes_f * quality_f + a10_f + intern_f + nonqq_f + honor_f + college_985_f,
  data = resume_clean,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

# 模型3：CFA × 工作经验（检验CFA是否对低经验者更重要）
model_cfa_experience <- glm(
  reply_f ~ experience + gender_f + quality_f +
    cfayes_f * experience + a10_f + intern_f + nonqq_f + honor_f + college_985_f,
  data = resume_clean,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

# 模型4：CFA × MVSA课程（检验证书与课程信号是否存在替代关系）
model_cfa_mvsa <- glm(
  reply_f ~ experience + gender_f + quality_f + 
    cfayes_f * mvsa_f + a10_f + intern_f + nonqq_f + honor_f + college_985_f,
  data = resume_clean,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

# 汇总所有模型，便于统一展示
models_list <- list(
  "Model 1: 院校交互" = model_cfa_college,
  "Model 2: 质量交互" = model_cfa_quality,
  "Model 3: 经验交互" = model_cfa_experience,
  "Model 4: 课程交互" = model_cfa_mvsa
)

# 回归结果表（控制台预览）
modelsummary(
  models_list,
  output = "markdown",
  stars = TRUE,
  coef_rename = c(
    "cfayes_fCFA" = "CFA证书",
    "college_985_f985" = "985院校"
  ),
  gof_omit = "IC|Log.Lik|F",
  title = "CFA证书对简历回复率影响的交互效应分析"
)

# CFA × 院校：分别计算985与非985下，CFA的平均边际效应
mfx_college <- avg_comparisons(
  model_cfa_college,
  variables = "cfayes_f",
  by = "college_985_f"
)
print(mfx_college)

# CFA × 简历质量：比较高低质量简历中，CFA的作用差异
mfx_quality <- avg_comparisons(
  model_cfa_quality,
  variables = "cfayes_f",
  by = "quality_f"
)
print(mfx_quality)

# CFA × 工作经验：在不同经验水平下计算CFA的边际效应
experience_vals <- c(0, 5, 10, 15)

newdata <- expand.grid(
  experience = experience_vals,
  cfayes_f = c("NoCFA", "CFA"),
  gender_f = "Female",
  quality_f = "Low",
  a10_f = "NonA10",
  intern_f = "NoIntern",
  nonqq_f = "NoNonQQ",
  honor_f = "NoHonor",
  college_985_f = "Non985"
)

mfx_experience <- avg_comparisons(
  model_cfa_experience,
  variables = "cfayes_f",
  newdata = newdata
)
print(mfx_experience)

# CFA × MVSA：在是否上过MVSA课程的情况下比较CFA的预测效果
mfx_mvsa_cfa <- avg_predictions(
  model_cfa_mvsa,
  variables = "cfayes_f",
  by = "mvsa_f"
)
print(mfx_mvsa_cfa)

# 可视化：模型1（CFA × 院校）
plot_college <- plot_comparisons(
  model_cfa_college,
  variables = "cfayes_f",
  by = "college_985_f"
) +
  labs(title = "CFA × 院校：CFA对回复概率的影响")
print(plot_college)

# 可视化：模型2（CFA × 简历质量）
plot_quality <- plot_comparisons(
  model_cfa_quality,
  variables = "cfayes_f",
  by = "quality_f"
) +
  labs(title = "CFA × 简历质量：CFA对回复概率的影响")
print(plot_quality)

# 可视化：模型3（CFA × 工作经验）
pred_data <- expand.grid(
  experience = seq(0, 15, 0.5),
  cfayes_f = c("NoCFA", "CFA"),
  gender_f = "Female",
  quality_f = "Low",
  college_985_f = "Non985",
  a10_f = "NonA10",
  intern_f = "NoIntern",
  nonqq_f = "NoNonQQ",
  honor_f = "NoHonor"
)

pred_data$pred <- predict(
  model_cfa_experience,
  newdata = pred_data,
  type = "response"
)

plot_experience <- ggplot(
  pred_data,
  aes(x = experience, y = pred, color = cfayes_f)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "CFA × 工作经验：CFA效应随经验变化",
    x = "工作经验（年）",
    y = "预测回复概率",
    color = "是否持有CFA"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
print(plot_experience)

# 可视化：模型4（CFA × MVSA）
plot_mvsa_cfa <- plot_predictions(
  model_cfa_mvsa,
  variables = "cfayes_f",
  by = "mvsa_f"
) +
  labs(title = "CFA × MVSA课程：证书与课程信号的交互影响")
print(plot_mvsa_cfa)

```
